mysite
Table of Contents

Interface IReservaRepository

Namespace
DAL.Contracts
Assembly
DAL.dll

Repository contract for Reserva entities, extending standard CRUD with reservation-specific query and availability check operations.

public interface IReservaRepository : IGenericRepository<Reserva>
Inherited Members
IGenericRepository<Reserva>.Add(Reserva)
IGenericRepository<Reserva>.Update(Reserva)
IGenericRepository<Reserva>.Remove(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Reserva>.GetById(Guid)
IGenericRepository<Reserva>.GetAll()

Methods

EspacioDisponible(Guid, DateTime, int)

Checks whether a space is available for a reservation starting at fechaHora for duracion minutes.

bool EspacioDisponible(Guid espacioId, DateTime fechaHora, int duracion)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space to check.

fechaHora DateTime

Proposed start date and time.

duracion int

Duration in minutes.

Returns

bool

true if no conflicting active reservation exists; otherwise false.

GetByCliente(Guid)

Retrieves all reservations belonging to a specific client.

List<Reserva> GetByCliente(Guid clienteId)

Parameters

clienteId Guid

The client whose reservations to fetch.

Returns

List<Reserva>

List of the client's reservations; empty list if none.

GetByCodigo(string)

Retrieves a reservation by its unique human-readable code.

Reserva GetByCodigo(string codigoReserva)

Parameters

codigoReserva string

The reservation code (e.g., "RES-123456-ABCD").

Returns

Reserva

The matching Reserva, or null if not found.

GetByEspacio(Guid, DateTime, DateTime)

Retrieves all reservations for a given space within a date-time range.

List<Reserva> GetByEspacio(Guid espacioId, DateTime desde, DateTime hasta)

Parameters

espacioId Guid

The space to filter by.

desde DateTime

Inclusive lower bound of the date range.

hasta DateTime

Inclusive upper bound of the date range.

Returns

List<Reserva>

List of matching reservations; empty list if none.
